summary: Action pinned @v4 not a SHA; no shellcheck or bats-install steps despite both being task requirements. Workflow run: block repeats create-config→create-files→run 6× (~lines 20-100) with no factoring. assign_labels uses IFS=: read which silently truncates labels containing colons. BASH_SOURCE guard is good; set -euo pipefail and die() are solid.
